title: Delete Unit
content:
# Delete Unit

Permanently delete an existing Unit. An error will be returned if there are any current links to a Unit. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /datastreams/units/{unit_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.datastreams.deleteDataStreamUnit()
print(response)

parameters.name: unit_name
parameters.description: Unit key `name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
